case_title: DIEDRE JOHNSON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-04-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DIEDRE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-06-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-02-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-22-2013

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-04-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-18-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DIEDRE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-06-2013 CONTINUED TO DEC-18-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
